creator: lbartoletti@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 221414
orange3 3.27.1

Yuri,

Orange3 3.19.0 blocks numpy update ( https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=251626#c7 )

Please, can you update Orange3 to 3.27.1? It builds well with numpy 1.9.0, but I haven't tested what this does at run.

Thanks.
